meta.description: Golden example states for key design-system components. Used by documentation, preview viewers, and agent verification to understand what good looks like.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: Primary action button in resting state.

golden_states.name: hover
golden_states.description: Pointer hover state for desktop interactions.

golden_states.name: focus
golden_states.description: Keyboard focus ring is visible and accessible.

golden_states.name: disabled
golden_states.description: Action is unavailable and visually muted.

golden_states.name: loading
golden_states.description: Async action is in progress and duplicate submission is blocked.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: Field label, placeholder, and input chrome render normally.

golden_states.name: focus
golden_states.description: Focused border or ring is visible with no layout shift.

golden_states.name: error
golden_states.description: Validation error text and error styling appear together.

golden_states.name: disabled
golden_states.description: Input is non-interactive and visually de-emphasized.

golden_states.name: readonly
golden_states.description: Field is readable but not editable.

golden_states.name: unchecked
golden_states.description: Label and checkbox are aligned and readable.

golden_states.name: checked
golden_states.description: Selection is clearly visible without shifting nearby layout.

golden_states.name: disabled
golden_states.description: Checkbox is non-interactive and visually muted.

golden_states.name: off
golden_states.description: Switch is off and the label remains readable.

golden_states.name: on
golden_states.description: Switch is on with a clear semantic accent color.

golden_states.name: disabled
golden_states.description: Switch cannot be toggled and remains visually de-emphasized.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: All options are readable and equally aligned.

golden_states.name: selected
golden_states.description: The active option is clearly selected.

golden_states.name: disabled
golden_states.description: The full option group is visibly non-interactive.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: All tabs are visible and inactive tabs are readable.

golden_states.name: active
golden_states.description: Selected tab is clearly differentiated.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: Page title, content region, and accessory area are aligned.

golden_states.name: with_breadcrumb
golden_states.description: Breadcrumb is visible and does not compete with the page title.

golden_states.name: with_right_accessory
golden_states.description: Header action aligns with the title without crowding it.

golden_states.name: idle
golden_states.description: Title, inputs, forgot-password action, and submit button are visible.

golden_states.name: submitting
golden_states.description: Submit action is disabled while async sign-in is running.

golden_states.name: error
golden_states.description: Auth error message appears below the fields without collapsing layout.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: Title, body copy, and primary/secondary actions are visible.

golden_states.name: destructive
golden_states.description: Dangerous action is visually distinct and clearly labeled.

golden_states.name: collapsed
golden_states.description: Current color token or hex value is visible in the trigger.

golden_states.name: expanded
golden_states.description: Color panel, sliders, and confirmation affordances are visible.

golden_states.name: idle
golden_states.description: Bulk action bar remains hidden or visually calm when nothing is selected.

golden_states.name: selection_active
golden_states.description: Selected count and primary bulk action are clearly visible.

golden_states.name: default
golden_states.description: Header, row data, and alignment remain readable at a glance.

golden_states.name: empty
golden_states.description: No-data messaging is visible without collapsing the table frame.

golden_states.name: active
golden_states.description: Positive state uses active semantics and remains readable.

golden_states.name: inactive
golden_states.description: Muted state remains visible but not overly prominent.

golden_states.name: running
golden_states.description: Live countdown or elapsed time updates without layout jitter.

golden_states.name: expired
golden_states.description: Expired timer remains readable and semantically clear.

golden_states.name: positive
golden_states.description: Success state uses success semantics and remains readable.

golden_states.name: warning
golden_states.description: Warning state uses warning semantics and remains readable.

golden_states.name: negative
golden_states.description: Error state uses danger semantics and remains readable.

golden_states.name: neutral
golden_states.description: Informational or inactive state is visually calm.
